title: Can you @ mention yourself and get notified?
excerpt: Hey there, I’m wondering if it’s possible to get a notification if you @ mention yourself. For example, our marketing team has a weekly meeting where we go through each item, and I’m usually the person taking notes. I’ll…

posts.author: meghankmc (Meghan McMaster)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there, I’m wondering if it’s possible to get a notification if you @ mention yourself. For example, our marketing team has a weekly meeting where we go through each item, and I’m usually the person taking notes. I’ll @ mention my team members when there’s an update pertaining to them, but I’ve noticed if I @ mention myself, I don’t get a notification. I’d love if there was a way to keep track of those!

posts.author: JayD (Jay Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ever figure this one out at all? I have the same issue and am trying to solve it.
Thanks.

posts.author: teodorvoinea56 (Teodor Voinea)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, on Monday.com, you typically won’t receive a notification if you @ mention yourself. A workaround is to use an automation or integrate with a third-party app like Slack or email, where you can set up alerts for mentions, including self-mentions.

posts.author: cspahr (Cam Spahr)
posts.cookedHtml: What automation allows for this? I cannot find this but would love this.
